Implement a module named shift_register — a 4-bit serial-in, parallel-out shift
register with synchronous reset.

Interface:
  - input  clk        (clock)
  - input  rst        (synchronous reset, active high)
  - input  in         (serial data in)
  - output out (4 bits, parallel out)

On every rising edge of clk: if rst is high, out is set to 0; otherwise the
register shifts left by one, shifting `in` into the least-significant bit
(out <= {out[2:0], in}). This is a sequential circuit.
